quoteFirst: It was in this room, so he told us, that he used to be ceaselessly annoyed by a mouse, which began to perambulate
quoteLast: , night after night, for many weeks: night after night he would resolve, he said, to "humour it no longer"--but night after night he would at last get up and open the door for it to go into his other room, which it instantly did, returning by some secret way to renew its wanderings the next night.
